items.headline: Elon Musk’s Brain-chip Startup Aims for Scalability with New Transdural Procedure
items.summary: Elon Musk’s brain-computer interface (BCI) startup Neuralink announced the company has successfully performed its first transdural brain implant surgery, which promises to increase scalability while significantly reducing surgical trauma. The News In a new vi…
